summary: Plan-only inventory review. No merge recommendation has complete merge preflight. #59694 is quarantined for central security review; #59695 has a narrow repair path for its failed tooling check; #62063, #64316, and #77158 need maintainer decisions before finalization.

actions.reason: Prototype-pollution and leakage language is security-shaped enough to route this exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling; no merge, comment, label, close, or fix action should be planned here.

The PR is narrow and repairable, but the failed tooling check blocks merge. Repair the contributor branch, preserve YonganZhang credit, rerun targeted validation, and require Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
Broad session-state and compatibility work with dirty/refactor labels is a maintainer judgment call; it is not safe to merge or auto-repair from this compact artifact.
This is broad locale and automation work with failed checks, waiting-on-author state, and unresolved bot-review context; maintainer direction is required before repair or merge planning.
The code delta looks focused, but the PR is explicitly waiting on author and lacks hydrated follow-up context plus required /review evidence. That active-author state blocks automated finalization.
